issue_summary: Reproduce : unwrapped with prefix empty Object
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Mutant factory method for constructing a map where all entries use given
     * prefix
     */
javadoc_after:
/** * Mutant factory method for constructing a map where property names * are transformed using the given {@link NameTransformer}. *

* NOTE: transformer is applied to property names only; value deserializers * are left untouched. Non-unwrapped nested values deserialize from their * own JSON object (not a flattened one), so propagating a prefix/suffix * into their property names would be incorrect (see [databind#3178]). */
